response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development — a rare and explicitly required skill. Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) align well with the role. Gaps are mostly at the framework level (no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin exposure) rather than fundamentals, so an interview is warranted.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles, plus recent AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work
Strong engineering-practice pedigree: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, testing workshops, and open-source test tooling authorship
Cloud and container proficiency (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) with database experience in MongoDB and SQL
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin and Python absent from skills; Java experience appears dated and secondary
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not named despite strong testing culture; frontend history leans Ember.js over React in earlier roles
